allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const uri = process.env.MONGO_URI || ''; console.log\('URI set:', !!uri\); console.log\('Has placeholder:', uri.includes\('<user>'\) || uri.includes\('cluster.mongodb.net'\) && !uri.includes\('@'\)\); console.log\('Starts with mongodb+srv:', uri.startsWith\('mongodb+srv'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const uri = process.env.MONGO_URI || ''; const masked = uri.replace\(/:\\/\\/\([^:]+\):\([^@]+\)@/, '://<user>:<pass>@'\); console.log\('MONGO_URI:', masked\);")
